mainEntity.name: How does AEO strategy actually work behind the scenes with AI Overviews and voice assistants?

acceptedAnswer.text:
AEO strategy works by identifying the questions your buyers ask, creating or restructuring content to answer them directly, and marking those answers up with schema so answer engines can reliably extract and trust them. It’s part content design, part technical markup, and part authority building.

Answer engines scan your pages for clear question‑answer pairs with strong credibility signals; your job is to make those easy to find and verify.

Key components:
- Question research from search data, calls, chats, and forums
- Direct‑answer layouts (answer first, detail second)
- Schema markup (FAQPage, HowTo, Article, Organization, LocalBusiness)
- E‑E‑A‑T signals: experience, expertise, authoritativeness, trustworthiness

Practically, you’ll map 50–100 buyer questions to specific pages, fix the structure and headings, add concise answer blocks, and implement JSON‑LD markup that matches visible content.

When done consistently, AEO turns your website into a well‑indexed Q&A library that AI systems can safely quote across multiple search and assistant surfaces.
acceptedAnswer.description: AEO strategy works by turning your site into a structured Q&A library. You research real buyer questions, answer them clearly at the top of your content, and add matching schema markup. This makes it easy for AI Overviews, voice assistants, and answer boxes to extract, trust, and display your answers.
